message_title: Massive Game Update v1.4.1 is Here!
message_body:
Blind Temple Run has received incredible new features!
- Real environmental sounds for obstacles (Rivers, Snakes, Monsters)!
- Global Leaderboards: Compete with players worldwide!
- P2P Gifting: Send Gold & Diamonds to other players!
- Player Mailbox: Check your inbox for gifts and messages!
- Manual Updater: Check for updates directly from Settings!

Please update your game to v1.4.1 to enjoy all these features!
